title: gardenia cuneata
intro: Gardenia cuneata, also known as the East African gardenia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and is used to treat various health issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive problems, as well as its use as an antiseptic to clean wounds and prevent infection. Herbal preparations of Gardenia cuneata include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
